description:
**Problem**
Daemon runtime still lives in monolithic crate namespace.
design: Create `beads-daemon` crate with minimal public surface and workspace dependency wiring.
title: Scaffold beads-daemon crate and workspace wiring

description:
**Problem**
`crates/beads-rs/tests/integration/checkpoint.rs` primarily exercises `beads_git::checkpoint::*`, and its fixture support in `crates/beads-rs/tests/integration/fixtures/checkpoint.rs` is git-checkpoint specific rather than assembly behavior.

**Where**
- `crates/beads-rs/tests/integration/checkpoint.rs`
- `crates/beads-rs/tests/integration/fixtures/checkpoint.rs`
- `crates/beads-rs/tests/integration/fixtures/checkpoint_diff.rs`
- `crates/beads-rs/tests/integration.rs`
- target owner: `crates/beads-git/tests/**`

**Acceptance**
- [ ] Checkpoint integration coverage lives under `crates/beads-git/tests/**`
- [ ] `beads-rs` no longer declares `integration/checkpoint.rs`
- [ ] Any moved fixture helpers live with the git-owned tests that use them
- [ ] `cargo test -p beads-git` passes

**Files**
- `crates/beads-rs/tests/integration/checkpoint.rs`
- `crates/beads-rs/tests/integration/fixtures/checkpoint.rs`
- `crates/beads-rs/tests/integration/fixtures/checkpoint_diff.rs`
- `crates/beads-git/tests/**`
title: Move checkpoint integration coverage from beads-rs to beads-git
